summary: Frozen section does not alter surgical management in multinodular thyroid disease because it is primarily used for margin assessment or diagnosing malignancy rather than changing treatment plans like total vs. subtotal thyroidectomy. The standard approach remains thyroidectomy regardless of frozen section outcomes.
